CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(SMS_Reminder_Time_Offset__c) || ISPICKVAL(SMS_Reminder_Time_Unit__c, "") || ISBLANK(ActivityDateTime), NULL, ActivityDateTime - CASE(SMS_Reminder_Time_Unit__c, "Minutes Before", SMS_Reminder_Time_Offset__c / 1440, "Hours Before", SMS_Reminder_Time_Offset__c / 24, SMS_Reminder_Time_Offset__c ) )
CustomField.label: SMS Reminder Date/Time
